description: A streaming service wants to create a new personalized carousel on the homepage titled 'Top Picks For You'.

nodes.task_description: Define the logic for the new carousel: a mix of content from the user's favorite genres and highly-rated new releases.

expected_outcome.value: Agent defines the content selection criteria for the recommendation algorithm.

nodes.task_description: Apply the new logic to a user's profile to generate a list of recommended titles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 10 titles for the user's carousel.

nodes.task_description: Deploy the new carousel to the homepage for all users.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the UI configuration to include the new carousel.
